<p><strong>Preparation of Accuracy standard stock solution-1:</strong></p><p>{INPUT_1}</p><p><strong>Preparation of Accuracy standard stock solution-2:</strong></p><p>Transferred {INPUT_2} (mL) of (step-3) standard stock solution into a {INPUT_3} (mL) volumetric flask containing {INPUT_4} (mL) of diluent and vortex for {INPUT_5} (2) minutes. Diluted to volume up to the mark with diluent and mixed well.</p><p><strong>Preparation of Accuracy standard stock solution-3:</strong></p><p>Transferred {INPUT_6} (mL) of (step-3) standard stock solution into a {INPUT_7} (mL) volumetric flask containing {INPUT_8} (mL) of diluent and vortex for {INPUT_9} (2) minutes. Diluted to volume up to the mark with diluent and mixed well.</p><p><strong>Preparation of Accuracy standard stock solution-4:</strong></p><p>Transferred {INPUT_10} (mL) of (step-3) standard stock solution into a {INPUT_11} (mL) volumetric flask containing {INPUT_12} (mL) of diluent and vortex for {INPUT_13} (2) minutes. Diluted to volume up to the mark with diluent and mixed well.</p>
